arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim makes concerning Ayden Heaven injury admission after huge Man Utd scare
arts.sum: Manchester United claimed a welcome win away at Leicester City in the Premier League but it was marred by an injury to Ayden Heaven which saw the defender taken off on a stretcher

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim insists his Man United side are still 'SO far away' from the standards he demands... despite their 3-0 triumph over Leicester
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim admitted Manchester United are still a huge distance from the standard demanded by their fans despite their second win in four days.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim: Rasmus Hojlund ending Man Utd goal drought was really important
arts.sum: Hojlund scored his first goal since December 12 before Alejandro Garnacho ended his 24-game scoreless streak in the 3-0 win away at Leicester.

arts.ttl: Fernandes central to Man United's much-needed win at Leicester
arts.sum: Bruno Fernandes assisted on two Manchester United goals before netting one himself in their 3-0 Premier League win at Leicester City on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Ayden Heaven injury: Manchester United defender 'seen walking with foot brace' as Ruben Amorim reveals update
arts.sum: January signing from Arsenal was stretchered off in concerning scenes on his full Premier League debut at Leicester

arts.ttl: Manchester United defender Ayden Heaven leaves King Power Stadium in protective boot
arts.sum: Ayden Heaven suffered a horrible looking injury against Leicester City on Sunday night but the Man Utd defender managed to walk out of the stadium.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim reveals one aspect of Bruno Fernandes' game that has surprised him
arts.sum: Manchester United extended their unbeaten run to seven games in all competitions, with Bruno Fernandes providing two assists and scoring the third to move Amorim's side up to 13th

arts.ttl: Bruno Fernandes comes out fighting in fresh response to Roy Keane criticism
arts.sum: Roy Keane has been vocal in his criticism of Manchester United captain Bruno Fernandes but the Portugal international responded with a big performance at Leicester

arts.ttl: Leicester 0-3 Manchester United: Rasmus Hojlund and Alejandro Garnacho end goal droughts but Ayden Heaven injured
arts.sum: Red Devils deepen Ruud van Nistelrooy’s plight as relegation-threatened Foxes suffer their 13th loss in 14 Premier League matches

arts.ttl: Man Utd receive Osimhen update as Isak to Arsenal heats up
arts.sum: Man Utd receive Osimhen update as Isak to Arsenal heats up Marc Guehi is "expected" to secure a big-money transfer this summer amid interest from Arsenal, Chelsea, Liverpool and Man Utd.
